programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Essex, partners Mike and Heather hope to impress their guests with a menu of Mediterranean-inspired dishes, but Fussy eaters Jess and Salv cant hide their true feelings about the starter

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete to throw the best dinner party in the West Midlands. Image-conscious couple Sarah and Jack kick off the competition with a clean-living menu. Their guests think the food is a little too healthy, but the entertainment breaks the ice as everyone lets loose at the silent disco. On day two, foodies Liz and Martin cook an Italian feast from scratch, inspired by recipes from Lizs Italian mother. Finally Carl and Sonya serve up a pub-inspired menu and a huge surprise

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigis in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owners father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Parks Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorges in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duos suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makiss reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike and Nellies Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateurs two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The contestants are treated to a banger of a song sung by Little Alex Horne, but some of them dont entirely appreciate it. Kumail Nanjiani holds Amy Gledhill and Joe Dommett while they ask him questions about shapes and colour, Joanna Page reveals her favourite childhood tipple, and Armando Iannucci goes for an ice cream. As always, Greg Davies hands out points to those who deserve them and withholds points from those who have disappointed him. programme.title: Bill Bailey: Cosmic Jam
programme.desc: In his classic debut live stand-up show, filmed at Londons Bloomsbury Theatre in 1996, Bill explains why Bryan Adams is perhaps the greatest ever exponent of the rock anthem; demonstrates the influence that Cockney music has had on the great classical composers; and warns of the perils of a world ruled by insects, while playing the second-biggest gong in Britain

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin and the rest of the gang are excited to attend an outdoor pursuits weekend which aims to bring Protestant and Catholic school kids together as part of a peace initiative. The return of the comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Louisa Harland

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.sub-title: Ms De Brún and the Child of Prague
programme.desc: New English teacher Ms De Brún (Judith Roddy) arrives at Our Lady Immaculate and the friends immediately find themselves inspired. Meanwhile, Da Gerry attempts to take Ma Mary out on a date to the cinema, where things definitely dont go according to plan, and Sister Michael takes charge of a precious Child of Prague statue. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Uzzi helps Kyles girlfriend to rid him of a tacky tribute to another lady, and Sketch tackles a tattoo for Gina that is tarnishing memories of her deceased husband

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the show, in which captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock are joined by guests Alex Jones, Joe Wilkinson, Danny Dyer and Miles Jupp. The teams answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today. Jimmy Carr hosts

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.sub-title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown Christmas Special 2023
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a festive edition of the comedy words-and-numbers quiz packed with festive surprises. Danny Dyer and Joe Lycett take on Jon Richardson and Roisin Conaty with Mr Swallow joining lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley is on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Model, author and body activist Ashley Graham goes incognito to meet aspiring dreamers hoping to break through into the fashion world. Disguised as a hairdresser who dreams of working in the fashion industry, Ashley meets two struggling models who dont fit the usual mould and one uniquely inspiring young dancer

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Seal goes undercover, disguised as a sales executive, to find talented musicians struggling to make it in the music industry

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? Paul, Mary and their twins go underground as renovations force them to live in their basement. As our twins get to work above ground, will their efforts give the family reason to raise the roof?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in the Spanish resort of Marbella as they competes for the cash prize of £1,000. Stephen and his Colombian boyfriend Juan plan to keep things simple in the kitchen, but two of their guests point out that the chicken is overcooked. At Glenn and Henriettes Mexican evening, the contestants get competitive when theyre let loose on a pinata, and Tristan and Louise hope to inject love into their dinner party - until Stephen gives them frank feedback on the food

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Birmingham, English teacher Corinne and her partner Dal are the first to host in a series of dinner parties, but their evening takes a strange turn when some of the guests prove to be very outspoken. Builder Jack and girlfriend Georgie manage to get their fellow contestants back on side with their food and hosting, and by the time IT workers James and Adele host, expectations are high

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Dean wants to relive his clubbing days and organises a nostalgic wedding in a London nightclub, while his bride-to-be Sandra, who has been kept waiting nearly a decade for her big day, is hoping for her childhood church, followed by a reception in a castle

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given just three weeks, £14,000 and the help of his best men to give his fiancee Bianca the wedding of her dreams. The pregnant bride-to-be would like a simple, classic day to remember, but Adam has other plans

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The CEO of a smoothie brand goes undercover in his own company to discover how recent changes in the products have affected both his employees and his customers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bowlero is a global bowling company with thousands of employees and hundreds of centres. It became a bowling giant almost overnight when it took over AMF and Bowlmor Lanes. Colie Edison created every element of the Bowlero brand. Now she wants to go undercover to find out how the new Bowlero is working for staff and customers. As her alter ego Michelle, who recently lost her job as a court reporter and now wants to find a second career, Colie works as a trainee manager, a lane server, an event host and a trainee facilities manager

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberrys in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Frustrated with only one low offer and not enough space, Samantha and Justin turn to the twins to transform their compartmentalised house. But a nasty surprise awaits them. Andis the couples one-mile radius too small for Drew to work with?Short:Frustrated with only one low offer, Samantha and Justin turn to the twins to transform their compartmentalised house. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Brighton, three couples compete to host the best dinner party and secure a cash prize of £1,000. First up, shipping broker Dan and his partner of 16 years, Pippa, hope that a menu of family favourites will bag them the cash - if Dan does exactly what Pippa tells him to. When glamorous duo Shan and Lauren turn up, Pippa witnesses the beginnings of a beautiful bromance between the men. Romance is in no short supply with the final couple, South Africans Jared and Ian. These lovebirds enjoy nothing better than giving each other zerbits and are more than happy to oblige with a demonstration on their night

programme.desc: Homers unattended gym bag leads to a terrorism scare, prompting the people of Springfield to vote for the hiring of a British security consultant - which results in the mass installation of surveillance cameras. But Chief Wiggum and the other officers tire of staring at screens, so they recruit town residents including Marge and Ned to keep watch. With the guest voice of Eddie Izzard

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides shes had enough of the experts advice and decides to ignore them completely

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party, but apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family go for a holiday at the seaside, where Homer is unwittingly tempted by a British femme fatale. With the guest voice of Olivia Colman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Abe is accused of a serious crime, prompting Kent Brockman to slanderously jump on the podcast bandwagon. With the guest voice of Stellan Skarsgard.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner and Superintendent Chalmers head out on a road trip to Cincinnati to attend an administrator convention. With the guest voice of Jason Bateman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa refuses to apologise for insulting Miss Hoover, but she comes to learn about her teachers private pain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Comic Book Guys origin story is revealed as he and his wife Kumiko debate having a baby

programme.title: Rat Race (2001)
programme.desc: A casino magnate approaches a group of no-hopers with the offer of $2million to whoever retrieves the sum from a locker in a train station in New Mexico, prompting a madcap cross-continent dash. Meanwhile, the casino owners high-rolling gambler friends place bets on which of the bumbling contestants will win. Comedy, with Rowan Atkinson, John Cleese, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Bates, Seth Green and Cuba Gooding Jr

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: In Cambodia, a spiritual journey leads the teams into the worlds largest religious monument, Angkor Wat, on a search for enlightenment with a real-life monk. Next, some teams fighting spirit is tested as they learn local martial arts, while others hope for luck and prosperity as they build traditional spirit houses. Then the celebrities face their fears as they sample some local delicacies

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins the high-school marching band and finds an unlikely mentor in Shauna Chalmers, while Homer becomes a craft beer brewer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A surprise from Marges past has her bonding with Bart and terrifying Homer

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody (2018)
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury and Queen go from playing small venues to becoming one of the biggest rock bands in the world. While Freddie comes to terms with his sexuality, outside forces threaten to tear the group apart, until their defining moment at Live Aid in July 1985. Oscar-winning biopic, starring Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Great British Bake Off, Vigil, Changing Rooms, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, This Morning and Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking. They also offer their opinions on the gas crisis and the relaxation of travel restrictions, as reported by the BBC and ITV. From September 2021

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the full-frontal dating show, and first into the studio is 23-year-old trans woman Callie from Glasgow, who is looking for a man who is proud to have her on his arm. Next up is 24-year-old product design engineer Luca from Edinburgh, a part-time model who is hoping to find his perfect muse

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which six potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 28-year-old nature lover Oliver from Norwich, who has never had a girlfriend, and 48-year-old building boss Claire from Manchester. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Teacher and self-confessed cougar Marie returns to the restaurant for a date with 32-year-old lighting technician Adrian, while sports enthusiast Stephanie is matched with former rugby player Stuart. Plus, 71-year-old Janet and 87-year-old former soldier George bond over their shared love of travel and even joke about jetting off to Venezuela together

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching, with cameras capturing their instant reactions. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While gathered around Jay and Glorias pool on a sunny December day, it dawns on the clan members that they are not going to be together over the festive period, so they bring the holiday forward by organising an express Christmas. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.desc: The restaurant heats up as fire performer Hayley goes on a date with business owner Glen who claims if he were a movie character it would be Christian Grey. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yannis in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasnt allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peters family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After making a mess of a speech at work, Homer tries to bolster his public speaking skills by turning to improvisational comedy. Marge decides to upgrade Barts tumbledown treehouse, but tensions arise when Bart questions her building skills

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by fellow chef Tony Singh for a tour of the Isle of Skye. Tony begins by visiting a local bakery that doubles as an art gallery. He also learns how to make the local oatcakes. James, meanwhile, is inspired by the seafood to cook a dish using plaice and lovage. The duo then take a boat trip, where they go dolphin spotting, and James cooks up a fresh lobster and langoustine dish with an added Scottish twist

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James visits the Shetland Islands, an area of natural beauty that hes always wanted to see. He gets to hire a vintage car to explore the area, where he learns about traditional fish salting and cooks a tasty vegetable curry at a local social enterprise project. Later on, James learns all about Shetland community spirit and cake at one of their famous Sunday teas, and finally cooks up a Shetland-inspired paella on a beautiful local beach

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are back in the world of desserts for custard week, which sees them serving up floating islands, a summer staple in the technical and a showstopping set gateau that uses custard as the basis. Will any of them prove good enough to win a Hollywood handshake? Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host as the bakers face pastry week. Each baker must show their vol-au-vent making skills, demonstrate a technical ability in creating a savoury snack and finally craft a showstopping 3D pie-scape depicting their favourite story from childhood. With only four places in the semi-final, who will be leaving the competition for good?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Triassic Hunt (2021)
programme.desc: A team of mercenaries are sent after two escaped dinosaurs, only to make the unwelcome discovery that the creatures are just as smart as humans. Action adventure, starring Michael Pare, Linnea Quigley and Ramiro Leal

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Donovans Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medics snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: Operation Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: A band of soldiers must battle their way through Nazi territory to rescue a scientist who could help turn the tide of the Second World War. Action adventure, starring Ifan Meredith, Kimberley Hews and Darren Hill

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Spocks shuttle crash-lands on unexplored planet Taurus II, where he and his crew find themselves attacked by a fearsome alien creature. Leonard Nimoy stars

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve investigates Josh Lang, a fellow astronaut who has acquired telepathic powers. William Shatner guest stars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: A rookie officer is wounded by fugitive gun thieves, causing his mentor Hooker to blame himself for the regrettable incident. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and the Rangers race to stop a plan to unleash a toxic gas that has the power to wipe out the entire population

programme.title: Outlander (2008)
programme.desc: An alien crash-lands in eighth-century Norway and discovers the deadly creature he was transporting has escaped and decimated a village. He joins forces with a local Viking tribe and they set out in pursuit of the ferocious beast before it can cause further bloodshed. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Caviezel, Sophia Myles, Jack Huston and John Hurt

programme.title: Pandorum (2009)
programme.desc: Two astronauts awake from suspended animation to discover the rest of the crew has disappeared and that they are suffering from memory loss. While exploring the vessel, one of them is set upon by hordes of mutant cannibals and faces a battle for survival as he tries to remember the purpose of the mission. Sci-fi horror, starring Ben Foster and Dennis Quaid

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive (1986)
programme.desc: Earth passes through the tail of a comet, causing everything mechanical to develop a life of its own - as well as a burning desire for vengeance against humanity. Sci-fi thriller, starring Emilio Estevez and Pat Hingle

programme.title: The Disappearance (1977)
programme.desc: A hit-man is shattered by the mysterious disappearance of his wife, and when his concern begins to affect his work, he vows to find out whats really going on. However, he soon realises the mystery might be connected to his latest job - and finds the trail leads him to the man at the top of his organisation. Haunting thriller with plenty to keep viewers gripped, starring Donald Sutherland, Francine Racette, David Hemmings and David Warner

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St Georges as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Aruns attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug arent successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, cyclist Matt suffers life-threatening injuries after a collision with a car. On the A1, 64-year-old John is trapped in his car after a head-on collision. Meanwhile, in Cumbria, heli-medics fly to one of the most remote roads in Britain to help Caroline who has come off a motorbike and is injured

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-two-year-old retired firefighter John is airlifted to AandE after being accidentally hit in the face with a golf club, which hit him so hard that it snapped. With a suspected critical head injury, he is sent for a CT scan, and doctors are concerned that his right eye is not reacting as it should and he is weak down the right-hand side of his body. Meanwhile, 77-year-old Joan arrives in St Georges after falling down the stairs at home and hurting her leg. As she waits to be treated, she talks about growing up in Camberwell

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: After falling over during the night at home and being rushed into AandE, 85-year-old Maura faces potentially life-changing injuries. CT scans reveal broken bones in her spine, and her son and daughter-in-law must decide when to share the gravity of the situation with Maura and her granddaughter Meg. Meanwhile, 37-year-old doctor Jim arrives at St Georges after a collision with a van while he was cycling to work. Despite putting on a brave face, scans reveal his injuries are more serious than first thought. Plus, a chef is treated after cutting her thumb while chopping peppers at home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, Kate Quilton sees whether shallots are actually just small onions and visits a potato farm looking for the reason baking potatoes cost more. Matt Tebbutt heads to frozen food company McCain to see how potatoes are transformed into their various products, most notably chips. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out why it is possible to get sheeps cheese in the supermarket, but never sheeps milk

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop manager Nicola Steele hosts the first dinner party in Cardiff, and hopes that her dog-themed surprises and unusual entertainment will impress her guests - army wife Rachael Smith, casting agency owner Jerry Lockett, childminder Andrea Grainger and chatterbox Sam Clark - and win her the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jerry Lockett hosts the second dinner party in Cardiff, and following a flood at his home, hopes to impress his guests by serving the meal at the grand venue of his cousins mansion

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Army wife Rachael Smith hosts the third party in Cardiff, allowing her competitive edge and no-nonsense approach to come to the fore in her bid to pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Costume designer Sam Clarke prepares a Mexican menu for the fourth dinner party in Cardiff. Everything does not go to plan, however, when two guests begin fighting at the table, and his fun game leaves everyone in tears

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childminder Andrea Grainger hosts the last dinner party as the competition in Cardiff draws to a close. She hopes a menu of traditional Welsh dishes will help her secure the prize, and lines up a selection of games to improve her chances of success. As the evening comes to an end, the diners discover which of the meals made the best impression

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Married couple Mo and Anthony seek a holiday apartment with a sea view in Torremolinos on Spains Costa del Sol. Laura Hamilton is tasked with showing them the best of what their £130,000 budget can get them. However, whether any of the five properties the property expert has up her sleeve will result in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Natalie and Matt from north Wales enlist the help of Jean Johansson in their search for a holiday home in Caleta de Fuste, Fuerteventura with a budget of £75,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry have decided its time to fulfil their dream of buying a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain. With a budget of £105,000, they want an apartment close to all the action. Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties for the pair to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is in the beautiful coastal region of Puglia in the south of Italy with house-hunter Marion, whos dreaming of buying a holiday home she can enjoy with her teenage daughter, friends and family. With her best friend Bronagh on hand to lend support, Marion would love to find a three-bedroom villa close to the beach - can Danni deliver her dream for Marions budget of £120,000?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Shane and Sharon dream of owning a holiday home on the Costa del Sol that they can escape to during the winter to enjoy the areas all-year round outdoor lifestyle. With a budget of £135,000, they want an apartment or town house close to the beach around La Cala de Mijas, with two bedrooms so their family can come to visit. Danni Menzies rises to the challenge to find them the perfect property

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A special episode in which two new property experts take the reins - siblings, business partners and experienced developers Scarlette and Stuart Douglas, who head to Ipswich to help a family living in a four-bed semi. City-loving Norbert loves the bedroom sizes, the neighbours, the location and the convenient commute to work, but Shammie hates the busy road, small kitchen and only having one bathroom. Armed with £30,000, Stuart comes up with a masterplan to create a more sociable family space downstairs, with real wow factor, and also give them a much-needed second bathroom upstairs

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: In Wales, George meets Tim and Kirsti, who are embarking on a renovation to create a new home for their blended family. Tims two children recently moved over from South Africa, making their current rental tight on space, so they needed to upsize and quickly. The high-street-shop-turned-accountants-office offered the five bedrooms they needed for a price they could afford. However, it lacks a family kitchen as well as connection to the garden, so they need to build a modern extension. But the building was built in 1725, is listed and is in a conservation area, which doesnt make things simple

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Lodge Duxford in Cambridgeshire, where a trip to see some vintage RAF planes sends group relations soaring, but two guests give poor cleanliness scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jo and Annabel welcome the BandBers to their modern aparthotel Emerald Stays in Stratford-upon-Avon, where the guests ponder whether to use or not to use the self-catering facilities. After some Shakespearean dress-up in the afternoon, two guests compare their nights sleep to kipping in a rave, leaving the hosts with a tragedy at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Karen and Adrian stake a claim for being the busiest BandBers in Four in a Bed history at The Barn in North Yorkshire - a BandB, village shop and post office all rolled into one. But one guest reckons that such a big to-do list means the hosts havent paid enough attention to his poached eggs at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Dilham Hall Retreats in Norfolk, hosted by farming couple Louise and Luke. Their riverside pods take everyones breath away, and a boat ride on the Norfolk Broads leaves them all feeling calm and serene - until attention turns to the looming drama of payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its been a week of tired eyes and undesired flies as the BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. On Payment Day, the weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Emma and Jonathan fear that a truck driver is bleeding internally from pelvic injuries after a high-speed crash. Dr Zaheer and nurse Ebony are vigilant for heart failure in a 28-year-old woman whos having a severe asthma attack and struggling to breathe despite multiple medications, while Dr Scott expects the worst when a 74-year-old man, who already has lung disease, is pinned under the car he was working on at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-one-year-old cyclist Bill is brought to St Georges from Surrey after being hit by a car. He was not wearing a helmet, and doctors are concerned he may have sustained a serious head injury. Meanwhile, 93-year-old Amy arrives in AandE with her friend after a clothes airer fell on top of her while she was hanging out the washing. Plus, an emergency nurse practitioner looks after 78-year-old Samuel, who landed on his face after falling over some boxes

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Ashleigh is rushed to St Georges by ambulance after twisting her leg while playing football. X-rays reveal that her femur is broken and she will need surgery. Meanwhile, three-year-old Lola visits AandE with her dad after having a seizure, and 91-year-old Betty arrives with severe chest pain. Doctors carry out a blood test in order to find out whether she is having a heart attack and will require life-saving surgery

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Emma and Jonathan fear that a truck driver is bleeding internally from pelvic injuries after a high-speed crash. Dr Zaheer and nurse Ebony are vigilant for heart failure in a 28-year-old woman whos having a severe asthma attack and struggling to breathe despite multiple medications, while Dr Scott expects the worst when a 74-year-old man, who already has lung disease, is pinned under the car he was working on at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-one-year-old cyclist Bill is brought to St Georges from Surrey after being hit by a car. He was not wearing a helmet, and doctors are concerned he may have sustained a serious head injury. Meanwhile, 93-year-old Amy arrives in AandE with her friend after a clothes airer fell on top of her while she was hanging out the washing. Plus, an emergency nurse practitioner looks after 78-year-old Samuel, who landed on his face after falling over some boxes

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St Georges as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Aruns attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug arent successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Briony May Williams embark on an epic journey through the Nordic region. Starting in the Viking fjords of west Norway, they take to the seas to uncover how cod farming could be part of the future. Travelling south through Swedens ancient landscape, they pay a special visit to a certain furniture store and learn just what makes a meatball so Swedish. They finish their journey in Finland, home to the happiest people in the world apparently, to find out what kind of food is putting a smile on their faces

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien come across a gramophone and a stow-away bed to restore. Meanwhile, Simon accidently puts his foot through a drum

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon OBrien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her BandB, The Oak, is better than any of her guests establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Tanya Manock offers up a Mediterranean-themed menu as she kicks off a week of dinner parties at her home in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, where one of her guests - medium Dean Fox - stumbles upon a plethora of lingerie in the bedroom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover Rod Tonge hosts the second dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, hoping his efforts will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, his chances are low as he has already insulted fitness instructor Tanya Manock, and HR manager Claire Lemon does not have high hopes for his entertaining skills

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Claire Lemon hopes to compensate for her imperfect cooking skills with her bubbly personality and superior hosting ability as she hosts on day three of the dinner-party challenge in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. But tension rises when Tanya barely touches the starter - or the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Psychic medium Dean Fox puts his cooking skills to the test during the fourth dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. His main course goes down well with his fellow diners, but his pudding jeopardises his bid to pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, and the turn of feisty mum Sadiya Hussein to host. The tension between Sadiya and Tanya threatens to reach boiling point, and the evening takes a curious turn when Sadiya decides to put psychic medium Dean Foxs clairvoyant powers to the test

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Shelley Guest House in Aberystwyth, where its husband-and-wife owners hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money by providing their guests with an old-school form of entertainment, some Spanish cuisine and a monumental continental breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests travel to the five-star Ixworth House in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, where hosts John and Sharyn Snell are quietly confident their establishment will impress. John reveals his hidden talents at dinner, but his performance at breakfast the next morning does not go down well with all of the fellow BandB owners

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House and Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. At supper, Hazel has romance on her mind, but the guests are left to fend for themselves at breakfast - until Graham makes a show-stopping appearance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the George Hotel in Orton, Cumbria, for the fourth visit of the day. Owner Hazel McAleese organises a fishing trip as the afternoon activity, during which one of the guests decides to use the opportunity to give everyone a lesson in innuendo

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the contest reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the BandB owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The dynamic property duo catch up with two sets of house-hunters who wanted to make the switch from London life to family life. In 2016, Cara and Ben realised that in order to have the space they wanted theyd need to move out of the capital. Keen cyclist Ben discovered Bishops Stortford when he was out on a bike ride, and the couple moved into a rental property there so that they could get a feel for the town before they bought. With the surprise arrival of baby Max, and their rental lease about to end, they were desperate to buy a place of their own. Phil showed them just what they were looking for, and as fate would have it, just around the corner from their rental. Kirstie and Phil catch up with Cara and Ben to find that theyve expanded to a family of four and the house has had a serious makeover. In 2020, Tom and his Floridian wife Kaitlyn were still house sharing with Toms old schoolfriend in south London. Desperate to find their own pad to start a family in and even with a healthy budget of £450k, the couple had been struggling to find everything on their wish list: three bedrooms, character, lots of outside space for keen gardener Tom, and the American-style large open-plan living space that Kaitlyn was used to. Even with Kirstie and Phil onside, none of the properties they saw hit enough of their marks to make the couple want to offer, so Phil advised them to expand their search area further east into Kent. Now, Phils back to see how theyre getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to Cowbridge in Wales to help a couple who have a home that, on the surface, looks perfect - its big, beautiful and in a picturesque location. But a long list of gripes, including a dysfunctional layout, has made Amy long for pastures new. However, having inherited the property from Louiss grandmother, it holds a special place in his heart and he is not ready to give up on it just yet

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Spring finally arrives in Swaledale and the Owens gear up for another busy lambing season - but there is still the task of putting the ancient hearth stone back in place in front of the fire. Amanda, Edith and Clemmie enjoy a picnic as builder Richard gets on with laying a stone floor on top of new cosy underfloor heating, while the kids collect frogspawn

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to AandE after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman collapses in the street while out shopping and may have broken her hip, shes in excruciating pain, but the paramedics need to move her. A man threatens to take an overdose if the paramedics dont take him to hospital. Plus, a man recovering from spinal surgery has a suspected blood clot on his lung

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two motorcyclists need specialist care, as the helicopter medics try to save the life of Pete, while Tom may have a serious spinal injury. Plus, a woman is kicked in the face by her horse. Documentary following the work of air ambulance crews

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Matt Tebbutt embark on an extraordinary road trip through Americas Deep South. Starting on the Gulf Coast, in New Orleans, they discover how the shells from the huge number of oysters consumed locally could protect the coastline. Heading through Mississippi, Jimmy and Matt find out what makes southern sweet tea different from a British cuppa. In Alabama, Matt wants to know why they fry green tomatoes, and Jimmy uncovers exactly what grits are. Then its off to Tennessee to visit the Jack Daniels distillery and discover the secrets of sour mash. In Louisville, where the South meets the North, Jimmy and Matt learn about fast-food consistency at Kentucky Fried Chicken HQ

programme.desc: In Wales, George meets Tim and Kirsti, who are embarking on a renovation to create a new home for their blended family. Tims two children recently moved over from South Africa, making their current rental tight on space, so they needed to upsize and quickly. The high-street-shop-turned-accountants-office offered the five bedrooms they needed for a price they could afford. However, it lacks a family kitchen as well as connection to the garden, so they need to build a modern extension. But the building was built in 1725, is listed and is in a conservation area, which doesnt make things simple

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jo and Annabel welcome the BandBers to their modern aparthotel Emerald Stays in Stratford-upon-Avon, where the guests ponder whether to use or not to use the self-catering facilities. After some Shakespearean dress-up in the afternoon, two guests compare their nights sleep to kipping in a rave, leaving the hosts with a tragedy at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Karen and Adrian stake a claim for being the busiest BandBers in Four in a Bed history at The Barn in North Yorkshire - a BandB, village shop and post office all rolled into one. But one guest reckons that such a big to-do list means the hosts havent paid enough attention to his poached eggs at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Dilham Hall Retreats in Norfolk, hosted by farming couple Louise and Luke. Their riverside pods take everyones breath away, and a boat ride on the Norfolk Broads leaves them all feeling calm and serene - until attention turns to the looming drama of payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its been a week of tired eyes and undesired flies as the BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. On Payment Day, the weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Emma and Jonathan fear that a truck driver is bleeding internally from pelvic injuries after a high-speed crash. Dr Zaheer and nurse Ebony are vigilant for heart failure in a 28-year-old woman whos having a severe asthma attack and struggling to breathe despite multiple medications, while Dr Scott expects the worst when a 74-year-old man, who already has lung disease, is pinned under the car he was working on at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-one-year-old cyclist Bill is brought to St Georges from Surrey after being hit by a car. He was not wearing a helmet, and doctors are concerned he may have sustained a serious head injury. Meanwhile, 93-year-old Amy arrives in AandE with her friend after a clothes airer fell on top of her while she was hanging out the washing. Plus, an emergency nurse practitioner looks after 78-year-old Samuel, who landed on his face after falling over some boxes

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St Georges as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Aruns attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug arent successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two motorcyclists need specialist care, as the helicopter medics try to save the life of Pete, while Tom may have a serious spinal injury. Plus, a woman is kicked in the face by her horse. Documentary following the work of air ambulance crews

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Briony May Williams embark on an epic journey through the Nordic region. Starting in the Viking fjords of west Norway, they take to the seas to uncover how cod farming could be part of the future. Travelling south through Swedens ancient landscape, they pay a special visit to a certain furniture store and learn just what makes a meatball so Swedish. They finish their journey in Finland, home to the happiest people in the world apparently, to find out what kind of food is putting a smile on their faces

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien come across a gramophone and a stow-away bed to restore. Meanwhile, Simon accidently puts his foot through a drum

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her BandB, The Oak, is better than any of her guests establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Tanya Manock offers up a Mediterranean-themed menu as she kicks off a week of dinner parties at her home in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, where one of her guests - medium Dean Fox - stumbles upon a plethora of lingerie in the bedroom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover Rod Tonge hosts the second dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, hoping his efforts will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, his chances are low as he has already insulted fitness instructor Tanya Manock, and HR manager Claire Lemon does not have high hopes for his entertaining skills

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Claire Lemon hopes to compensate for her imperfect cooking skills with her bubbly personality and superior hosting ability as she hosts on day three of the dinner-party challenge in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. But tension rises when Tanya barely touches the starter - or the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Psychic medium Dean Fox puts his cooking skills to the test during the fourth dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. His main course goes down well with his fellow diners, but his pudding jeopardises his bid to pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, and the turn of feisty mum Sadiya Hussein to host. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Shelley Guest House in Aberystwyth, where its husband-and-wife owners hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money by providing their guests with an old-school form of entertainment, some Spanish cuisine and a monumental continental breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests travel to the five-star Ixworth House in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, where hosts John and Sharyn Snell are quietly confident their establishment will impress. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House and Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. At supper, Hazel has romance on her mind, but the guests are left to fend for themselves at breakfast - until Graham makes a show-stopping appearance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the George Hotel in Orton, Cumbria, for the fourth visit of the day. Owner Hazel McAleese organises a fishing trip as the afternoon activity, during which one of the guests decides to use the opportunity to give everyone a lesson in innuendo

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the contest reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the BandB owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The dynamic property duo catch up with two sets of house-hunters who wanted to make the switch from London life to family life. In 2016, Cara and Ben realised that in order to have the space they wanted theyd need to move out of the capital. Keen cyclist Ben discovered Bishops Stortford when he was out on a bike ride, and the couple moved into a rental property there so that they could get a feel for the town before they bought. With the surprise arrival of baby Max, and their rental lease about to end, they were desperate to buy a place of their own. Phil showed them just what they were looking for, and as fate would have it, just around the corner from their rental. Kirstie and Phil catch up with Cara and Ben to find that theyve expanded to a family of four and the house has had a serious makeover. In 2020, Tom and his Floridian wife Kaitlyn were still house sharing with Toms old schoolfriend in south London. Desperate to find their own pad to start a family in and even with a healthy budget of £450k, the couple had been struggling to find everything on their wish list: three bedrooms, character, lots of outside space for keen gardener Tom, and the American-style large open-plan living space that Kaitlyn was used to. Even with Kirstie and Phil onside, none of the properties they saw hit enough of their marks to make the couple want to offer, so Phil advised them to expand their search area further east into Kent. Now, Phils back to see how theyre getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to Cowbridge in Wales to help a couple who have a home that, on the surface, looks perfect - its big, beautiful and in a picturesque location. But a long list of gripes, including a dysfunctional layout, has made Amy long for pastures new. However, having inherited the property from Louiss grandmother, it holds a special place in his heart and he is not ready to give up on it just yet

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Spring finally arrives in Swaledale and the Owens gear up for another busy lambing season - but there is still the task of putting the ancient hearth stone back in place in front of the fire. Amanda, Edith and Clemmie enjoy a picnic as builder Richard gets on with laying a stone floor on top of new cosy underfloor heating, while the kids collect frogspawn

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: Two days after the explosion, the world wakes up to a terrifying global disaster. programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: Workers begin to clean-up the deadly radioactive fallout from the explosion. After troops establish an exclusion zone, Gorbachev orders the construction of a vast concrete sarcophagus to cover the destroyed nuclear reactor. In Vienna, the world finally hears the Soviet explanation of what went wrong - but are they telling the truth?

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown

programme.desc: In 1937, German leader Adolf Hitler appeared to be fulfilling his promise of returning his nation to prosperity. However, there was a deeply sinister side to the recovery. This episodes focuses on his efforts to bankroll his dream of world domination

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: The series exploring the covert financial web spun by the Nazis continues. This episode explores how the Nazis finances were affected by preparing for and fighting war in Europe

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: As the Second World War ended, the hunt for the Nazi criminals began. Amid a battle for justice, there was also the search for the property the Nazis had stolen

programme.title: Chernobyl: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary exploring catalogue of errors that occurred in the run-up to the nuclear disaster, examining newly declassified evidence from the KGB archives about the safety of the plant. The programme examines concerns that had been voiced while the nuclear plant was still under construction, but which were ignored by the Soviet leaders

programme.title: Chernobyl: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Using previously classified KGB documents, the second part of this film explores how far Soviet leaders were willing to go to cover up the Chernobyl nuclear disaster of 1986, including exposing children to toxic fallout at the Kyiv May Day parade to prove to the world that all was fine. Featuring first-hand accounts from those who survived the blast, including Oleksiy Ananenko, who braved radioactive waters to prevent a deadlier second explosion and Maryna Sivets, whose unborn childs life was put at risk

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: In Munich, in September 1919, history was about to be changed by a penniless army corporal thirsty to avenge his adoptive motherland. Thirteen years later, Adolf Hitler would be saluted as the saviour of the German nation. This episode examines the covert financial web that Hitler spun across Europe and around the globe to bankroll his dream of world domination

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: In 1937, German leader Adolf Hitler appeared to be fulfilling his promise of returning his nation to prosperity. However, there was a deeply sinister side to the recovery. This episodes focuses on his efforts to bankroll his dream of world domination

programme.title: The Siege of Leningrad
programme.desc: The 872-day German and Finnish encirclement of the Soviet city between September 1941 and January 1944, which saw its inhabitants falling into despair, starvation and cannibalism. This documentary features extensive interviews with historian Anna Reid, while eyewitnesses recall the dramatic events. Original diaries and documents, along with rarely seen film and photographic material, illustrate the tragedy

programme.title: A Nation Denied: Ukraines Battle for History

programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth I visited Sudeley Castle in the Cotswolds for a three-day party commemorating the nations victory over the Spanish Armada. programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Peter Mason from Herefordshire brings an old-fashioned ice cream maker into the Repair Shop. Once belonging to his beloved Granny Ethel, Peter hopes metal craftsman Dom can bring the sentimental kitchen curiosity back to life. David Burville takes on the challenge of restoring a Spanish barrel organ known as an organillo. Owner Carolina Urraca is hoping David can breathe new life into the instrument she loved to play when growing up with her grandmother in Spain. Audio specialist tackles the repair of Lorraine McCourts portable record player from the 1950s. Originally a gift from her father to her mother when they were courting, the precious momento brings back memories of Lorraines parents dancing to Nat King Cole. Finally, Malcom Jordan from Chippenham brings in a 65 year-old leather document case for Susie Fletcher to repair

Serena Scott Thomas and Lee Evans also star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Detective drama set in the 1950s about a vicar and a police inspector solving crimes in rural Cambridgeshire. DC Phil Wilkinson arrests Sidney on a charge of sexual assault made by Harding Redmond after reading entries in the diary of his teenage daughter Abigail, who has now gone missing, along with the journal itself. After being grilled by DCI Benson, Sidney sets out to prove his innocence and is joined in his investigation by Geordie. James Norton and Robson Green star

programme.title: Super Garden
programme.desc: Five amateur designers take over a garden in a new housing estate - with the winning entry being recreated at Bord Bia Bloom, Irelands premier garden show. First up is Eoighan Mountaine Barry from Lucan in Dublin, whose striking design mixes hard materials like glass bricks with natural elements, such as his olive tree centrepiece. Judging his efforts are Kerrie Gardener, Carol Marks, Monica Alvarez and Brian Burke - a previous Super Garden winner

programme.title: Live UEFA Womens Champions League
programme.desc: Arsenal v Lyon (Kick-off 3.30pm). Marie Crowe presents all the action from the first leg of the semi-final, held at Emirates Stadium. Arsenal edged past London rivals Chelsea 3-2 on aggregate in the quarter-finals to maintain their chances of retaining the trophy. Lyon are record eight-time champions of Europe and scored three goals in extra time in the last eight to overcome VfL Wolfsburg 4-0 on the night and 4-1 over the two legs

Plus, Richter confesses his feelings to a traumatised Aileen

Darryl must act quickly to stay out of trouble, while Rhona is shocked by the danger she has invited into her home and makes a difficult decision concerning Chrissie

programme.desc: Mystery drama, starring Jamie Dornan and Danielle Macdonald. programme.title: Masters: Keepers of Tradition
programme.desc: A look at Irish practitioners of rare, traditional and remarkable crafts and skills, starting with one of the countrys finest stone carvers, Julia Gebel. She first arrived in Ireland from Germany to work on the restoration of Cormacs Chapel at the Rock of Cashel, the ancient seat of the Kings of Munster. Here she takes on a commission for a bust of Irish revolutionary Dick Barrett

programme.desc: Carla OBrien presents appeals for help from the public in solving crimes, featuring reconstructions, CCTV footage, news features and a panel of police advisers taking calls

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Master builder Harrison Gardner helps newly married couple Aoife NicChraith and Louis Brennan, who have plans for an ambitious modern extension to their one-bedroom cottage in Tuam, County Galway. They are essentially attaching a new three-bedroom house to a 200-year-old house to cater for their growing family

programme.title: Wolf Hall
programme.desc: Cromwell is arrested, stripped of his titles and imprisoned in the Tower of London, where he awaits trial. As he struggles to make sense of his fall from grace, he is visited by his friend and former ward, Rafe Sadler, now one of the kings gentlemen and the only person brave enough to bring the so-called traitor news from court

programme.title: You Will Die in Prison
programme.desc: Chronicling the 222-day ordeal of Bernard Phelan, an Irish-French citizen wrongfully taken hostage in Mashhad, Iran, in October 2022. The film opens with Phelans capture outside the Imam Reza mosque, thrusting viewers into his experience inside the notorious Satans Block of Mashhad prison. This documentary portrays Phelans struggle for survival, his relentless defiance against his captors, and the critical diplomatic efforts that secured his release on humanitarian grounds in May 2023

programme.title: You Will Die in Prison
programme.desc: Chronicling the 222-day ordeal of Bernard Phelan, an Irish-French citizen wrongfully taken hostage in Mashhad, Iran, in October 2022. The film opens with Phelans capture outside the Imam Reza mosque, thrusting viewers into his experience inside the notorious Satans Block of Mashhad prison. This documentary portrays Phelans struggle for survival, his relentless defiance against his captors, and the critical diplomatic efforts that secured his release on humanitarian grounds in May 2023

She then reinvented herself once more as a terminally ill author in Co Kerry, asking for money for surgery in LA.
